name: Rahul Patni
text:
I'm pleasantly surprised by how good Composer 2.5 is.

Feels like Opus 4.7 overthinks into making mistakes. Amazing workflow speed.

name: Angus Keatinge
text:
@leerob composer 2.5 on cursor cli is dominating opus 4.7 on claude code

fast mode completely changes the game

name: droidbuilds
text: Cursor Composer 2.5 is my go-to right now 😅

name: Michael Truell
text:
Composer 2.5 is a significant step up from Composer 2.

This is the very start of our work with SpaceXAI. Hope to have more improvements out soon.

name: Michael Truell
text:
Composer 2.5 is now the most-chosen model in Cursor.

We're giving everyone 10x usage for the rest of the day. Enjoy!
